prompt: Research Turner Construction for me — size, market focus, and reputation.

failures: expected at least one of [researchCompany] to fire — none did
score.finalText:
Plan:
1. Identify Turner Construction’s company size and footprint from current public sources.
2. Confirm market focus from Turner’s own site and compare with industry coverage.
3. Use reputation indicators from credible public rankings/awards.
4. Keep Alleato internal sources separate; none were needed because this is a public-company research question.

What I found

Public web sources
- Size:
  - Turner is the #1 contractor in ENR’s 2024 Top 400 Contractors list. ENR ranks it first by construction revenue. URL: https://www.enr.com/toplists/2024-Top-400-Contractors-1-preview
  - HOCHTIEF’s 2025 press release says Turner generated over $20 billion in revenue in 2024 and secured more than $26 billion in new contracts, with backlog above $39 billion in 2025. URL: https://www.hochtief.com/news-media/press-releases/press-release/turners-growth-recognized-with-leadership-across-key-market-sectors
  - Turner’s company size on LinkedIn is listed as 10,001+ employees. URL: https://www.linkedin.com/company/turner-construction-company
- Market focus:
  - Turner describes itself as a North America-based, international construction services company and a leading builder in diverse market segments. URL: https://www.turnerconstruction.com/market-sectors
  - Turner says its major market segments include healthcare, education, commercial, sports, aviation, pharmaceutical, retail, and green building. URL: https://www.turnerconstruction.com/market-sectors
  - Turner’s market-segment page also lists aviation & transportation, federal, sports & public assembly, healthcare, pharmaceutical & biotech, industrial & advanced manufacturing, and global critical facilities. URL: https://www.turnerconstruction.com/market-sectors
- Reputation:
  - ENR ranks Turner #1 in the U.S. contractor list for 2024. URL: https://www.enr.com/toplists/2024-Top-400-Contractors-1-preview
  - Turner says ENR ranked it #1 Green Builder in the U.S. for the 18th consecutive year. URL: https://www.turnerconstruction.com/insights/turner-named-1-green-builder-by-engineering-news-record-for-the-18th-consecutive-year
  - HOCHTIEF says Turner was ranked first in General Building, Healthcare, and Sports, and in the top five across 13 sectors including Education, Aviation, and Data Centers. URL: https://www.hochtief.com/news-media/press-releases/press-release/turners-growth-recognized-with-leadership-across-key-market-sectors

Bottom line
- Turner Construction is a very large, top-tier U.S. contractor with 10,001+ employees and roughly $20B+ annual revenue.
- Its core market focus is broad, but especially strong in healthcare, education, sports, aviation/transportation, commercial, pharma/biotech, industrial/advanced manufacturing, and critical facilities/data centers.
- Reputation-wise, it is widely regarded as one of the leading U.S. general contractors, with repeated ENR #1 rankings and sustained recognition in green building and multiple specialty sectors.

Alleato internal evidence
- None used. No project/vendor/contract/context lookup was needed.

If you want, I can turn this into a one-paragraph client-facing brief or a competitive comparison versus DPR, Whiting-Turner, and Skanska.
